prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `ad38a9d0`.
codex_response:
Implemented `ad38a9d0` in [__init__.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_ad38a9d0/__init__.py), [verifier.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_ad38a9d0/verifier.py), and [generator.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_ad38a9d0/generator.py). The rule is: find each 4-connected color-6 cluster on the color-7 background and recolor it by exact normalized shape: L-triomino -> 4, zig tetromino -> 8, plus -> 3, vertical length-3 line -> 2, vertical domino -> 9, and 2x3 rectangle -> 5.

I used the summary hint as a starting hypothesis because it matched the official examples; no correction was needed, so I did not add `notes.md`. The generator stays on-family by keeping the fixed 9x9 layout, background 7, the same six motif types, 1-2 Ls and 1-2 vertical triplets, orthogonal separation between objects, and a mix of border and interior placements. No new primitive was added.

Validation passed:
